channel.title: Strands Agents Blog - TypeScript
channel.description: Posts tagged with "TypeScript" from the Strands Agents blog.

item.title: Introducing Strands Agents TypeScript 1.0: Build Production Agents in TypeScript
item.description: Version 1.0 of the Strands Agents TypeScript SDK is here. Build type-safe AI agents with full model provider support, custom tools, plugins, and multi-agent orchestration in Node.js and the browser.

item.title: Strands Agents TypeScript SDK: Build AI Agents in TypeScript
item.description: The Strands Agents TypeScript SDK brings the model-driven approach to the TypeScript ecosystem. Build type-safe AI agents that run in Node.js and the browser.
